# Agent Mail Rooms

Agent Mail Rooms is a hosted remote MCP for OpenAI Codex agent coordination MCP.

Website: https://agentmailrooms.clauxel.com/
Docs pattern reference: https://github.com/clauxel/MiroFish
Primary keyword: OpenAI Codex agent coordination MCP
Type: MCP
Default plan: team
MCP endpoint: https://agentmailrooms.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://agentmailrooms.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Registry name: com.clauxel.agentmailrooms/agentmailrooms-mcp
Tools: mail_read_thread, mail_post_update, file_lease_claim, room_status_receipt

Public boundary: docs-only repository; no production source code or secrets.
